NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO AMEND ORDER FOR FINAL DISTRIBUTION, SETTLING FIRST, FINAL ACCOUNT & REPT., FOR ALLOW. OF COMP. & DECLARATION OF STEVEN A. WEINKAUF; POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, CALENDAR OF JUL-10-2014 NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION TO AMEND ORDER FOR FINAL DISTRIBUTION IS GRANTED WITH THE FOLLOWING MODIFICATIONS. THE PUBLIC ADMINISTRATOR MUST CORRECT AMOUNT TO BE DISTRIBUTED TO THE 5% BENEFICIARIES WHICH SHOULD BE APPROXIMATELY $27,206.40 AND THE CORRECT AMOUNT TO BE DISTRIBUTED TO THE 10% BENEFICIARIES WHICH SHOULD BE APPROXIMATELY $54,412.80. COUNSEL FOR THE MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT AN ORDER WITH THE CORRECTED FIGURES.
